title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at AIF - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at AIF - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
AIF invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AIF:
AIF is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIF!
